name: AD Mixtape · Christmas Jambree :: A Vintage Jamaican Yuletide Mixtape, Vol. 2
description: In 2017 Aquarium Drunkard brought you Christmas Jambree: A Vintage Jamaican Yuletide Mixtape. At 28 tracks it's an extensive collection of Jamaican reggae and ska Christmas tunes. If you've never heard it, do slide over there right now, but if you're already converted, and looking for a bit more in that vein, the following companion has you covered. Dig in, dig deep, and happy holidays.
